### 6. RTX 4090 sent for repair is a sophisticated fake with laser-etched VRAM and core, 'This is the best scam I've ever seen' — Scammers pulled a factory-level job to sell a dud to unsuspecting customer

- **Source**: Tom's Hardware
- **Date**: 2026-04-26
- **Tags**: Asus
- **Link**: https://www.tomshardware.com/pc-components/gpus/rtx-4090-sent-for-repair-is-a-sophisticated-fake-with-laser-etched-vram-and-core-this-is-the-best-scam-ive-ever-seen-scammers-pulled-a-factory-level-job-to-sell-a-dud-to-unsuspecting-customer

> Northwest Repair was sent an Asus ROG Strix 4090 that had a dead core and memory chips with fake markings to make it look like the real thing.
